pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)The One Who Watches is a psychological stalker that wants the player to feel observed, hunted, and unsafe.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)It does not always need to attack right away. A lot of its horror comes from forcing the player to stay alert.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)It stalks, pressures, and makes the player second-guess what they see.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)Its strength is making distance and darkness feel unsafe for a long time.
